reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  When the expansion condition is not met, the program fails to print the '-' character. An else clause is needed to print zifu[i] in this case.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  When the expansion condition is not met, the '-' character is not printed, causing it to be omitted from the output. An else branch should be added here to print zifu[i].
